title: Email/password authentication
description: Credential-based auth with NextAuth.js v5, password hashing, session management, middleware protection, RBAC

inScope: Password hashing with bcrypt or similar
Session management with JWT or database sessions

acceptanceCriteria.text: User can register with email and password
User can login with email and password
Admin routes protected from non-admin users
Customer routes protected from unauthenticated users
